back_translation: After these events, I saw another angel descending from heaven, having great authority, and the earth received light from his radiance

And the angel cried out with a powerful voice, ‘She has fallen, great Babylon has fallen, and that city has become a dwelling-place of demons, a cage for every unclean spirit, a cage for every unclean bird, and a cage for every unclean and detestable beast

Because all the nations have fallen down due to the wine of the passion of her sexual-immorality, and the kings of the earth have committed sexual-immorality with her, and the merchants of the earth have grown rich from the power of her luxurious extravagance’
And I heard another voice from heaven, saying, ‘My people, come out from that city, so that you will not have a share in her sins, and so that you will not receive her plagues
Because her sins have piled up reaching up to heaven, and God has remembered the unrighteousness of her
Pay her back as she has done to others, and pay her back double according to her deeds. In the cup that she mixed, mix double for her

As much as she has glorified herself and lived a luxurious-extravagant life, give to her that much torment and grief. Because in her heart she said, ‘I sit as queen, I am not a widow, and I will never have to see grief at all’
Therefore, in just one day, her plagues will come, namely death, grief, and famine, and she will be burned with fire, because the Lord God who judges her is mighty

And the kings of the earth, those who committed sexual-immorality and lived luxurious-extravagant lives with her, will weep and beat their chests in mourning over her, when they see the smoke of her burning
They will stand at a distance, because of fear of her torment, saying, ‘Disaster! Disaster! Great city, mighty Babylon city, because in just one hour, your judgment has come’
And the merchants of the earth will weep and lament over her, because no one buys their merchandise anymore

Namely, merchandise of gold, silver, precious stones, pearls, fine linen cloth, purple cloth, silk cloth, deep-red cloth, all kinds of citron-wood, every type of ivory implements, every kind of implements made from precious wood, bronze, iron, and marble
Cinnamon, spices, fragrant-substances, perfume, frankincense, wine, olive-oil, fine wheat-flour, wheat, livestock, sheep, horses, carriages, slaves, and souls of human-beings
And they say, ‘The ripe fruit of the desire of your heart has departed from you, and all your luxurious things and splendid things have vanished from you, and they will not find them again at all’
The merchants who sold these things, and grew rich because of her, will stand at a distance, because of fear of her torment. They will weep and lament
Saying, ‘Disaster! Disaster! Great city, the one who wears fine linen, purple, and deep-red, and is adorned with gold, precious stones, and pearls
Because in just one hour, such great wealth has been made desolate.’ And every shipmaster, every passenger of ships, all sailors, and everyone who makes their living from the sea stood at a distance
And when they saw the smoke of her burning, they cried out, saying, ‘What city would be like this great city?’

And they sprinkled dust on their heads, and weeping and lamenting, said, ‘Disaster! Disaster! Great city, in which everyone who had ships in the sea grew rich because of her wealth, because in just one hour she has been made desolate’
O heaven, rejoice over her, and saints, apostles, and prophets — also rejoice, because God has judged your case against her

And one mighty angel lifted up a stone like a great millstone, and threw it into the sea, saying, ‘With such violence as this, great Babylon city will be cast down, and they will not find her ever again

And the sound of harpists, musicians, flute-players, and trumpeters will not be heard in you anymore. And craftsmen of any kind of every trade will not be found in you anymore. And the sound of millstones will not be heard in you anymore

And the light of lamps will not shine in you anymore, and the voice of bridegroom and bride will not be heard in you anymore. Because your merchants were the great ones of the earth, because all the nations were deceived by your sorcery
And in her was found the blood of prophets, of saints, and of all those who were slaughtered on the earth’
